---
description: Official terminology and naming conventions for the Edenred assessment
applyTo: "**"
---
# Terminology Standards

## STATUS: ALWAYS APPLY

These terminology rules must be applied to all generated content.

## Official Terms

### Methodology Name
- **Use**: "AI-first delivery"
- **Never use**: "Gen-e2", "Gene2", "GenE2"
- **Context**: This is the methodology framework used for the Edenred Developer Experience 2026 assessment

### Repository Structure
- **Keep**: `.gene2-core/` (directory name remains unchanged for technical reasons)
- **Documentation**: When referring to this directory in documentation, write "AI-first delivery core" or simply "core framework"

### Examples
- ✅ "The AI-first delivery framework emphasizes..."
- ✅ "Using AI-first delivery principles..."
- ✅ "This assessment follows the AI-first delivery methodology..."
- ❌ "The Gen-e2 framework emphasizes..."
- ❌ "Using Gen-e2 principles..."

## Application

Apply this terminology consistently across:
- All meeting reports (CRs)
- Assessment reports
- Deliverables (roadmaps, presentations, blueprints)
- Documentation
- Interview guides
- Internal notes intended for client sharing

## Exceptions

The term "Gen-e2" may remain in:
- Historical references to prior projects or documentation
- Direct quotes from stakeholders or source materials
- Technical directory names (`.gene2-core/`)
